headline: New CRAFTSMAN® Project Hub Turns Extra Daylight into Extra Time Together This Father's Day
summary: This Father's Day, CRAFTSMAN®, a Stanley Black & Decker brand, is inviting families to trade extra daylight for extra time together with the launch of the "Longest Day Build Hub" on CRAFTSMAN.com.
